HorseshoeCrabDesc: These living fossils have changed little over 250 million years.
HorseshoeCrabEggDesc: A horseshoe crab egg, there's something moving inside.
HorseshoeCrabHemocyaninDesc: It becomes gel-like when exposed to bacteria.
HorseshoeCrab.Hatch: A horseshoe crab larva has hatched!
HorseshoeCrabAgedEggDesc: An aged horseshoe crab egg. Its a warm shade of amber.
